error_signature: LLM does not process image URLs correctly
title: Image URLs not processed by LLM
symptom: When passing image URLs to the LLM, it treats them as plain text and does not analyze the image content.
not_this_if: Image data is passed directly instead of URLs
root_cause: The LLM requires the actual image data rather than just the URL to perform analysis. By default, it does not fetch images from URLs, leading to incorrect processing.
fix_steps: Use a Request node to download the image from the URL
Enable the 'Automatically Passthrough Binary Images' option in the AI Agent settings
agent_instruction: Download the image using a Request node and enable the passthrough option in the AI Agent settings.
